response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role specifically requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief 6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), with the bulk of career in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS platforms. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed-systems architecture experience aligned with the JD.
strengths: Long track record as a senior engineer with broad polyglot exposure
Some distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at NI
No clear cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership experience
Lacks formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
